commands.review_summary:
The PR adds a generated Android/Apple native string inventory, shared native locale constants, package scripts, a native-i18n CI job, and focused inventory tests.

PR surface: Tests +37, Config +24, Other +8993. Total +9054 across 7 files.

Reproducibility: not applicable. This is a feature/tooling PR; current main lacks the native inventory surface and the PR adds a deterministic generator plus generated artifact.

target.title: feat(i18n): add native app locale inventory
target.body:
## What Problem This Solves

Native Android and Apple strings were outside the Control UI translation checks, so adding a language could leave app surfaces silently untranslated.

## Why This Change Was Made

Add a deterministic inventory for Android Compose and Apple SwiftUI/UIKit UI strings, define the shared 20-locale matrix, and expose stable inputs for the existing provider-backed translation refresh process.

## User Impact

CI now detects native-app i18n drift across English plus 20 target locales: Simplified Chinese, Traditional Chinese, Brazilian Portuguese, German, Spanish, Japanese, Korean, French, Hindi, Arabic, Italian, Turkish, Ukrainian, Indonesian, Polish, Thai, Vietnamese, Dutch, Persian, and Russian.

## Evidence

- `node --import tsx scripts/native-app-i18n.ts check` (`1257` entries)
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs test/scripts/native-app-i18n.test.ts`
- `git diff --check`

This is the foundation PR for the stacked Android, Apple, and refresh branches.
